articles.title: Implement a secure MCP server using OAuth and Entra ID
articles.description: Implement a secure MCP server using OAuth and Entra IDAI•Software Engineering  / 3mo The article shows how to implement a secure model context protocol (MCP) server using OAuth and Entra ID. The MCP server is implemented using ASP.NET Core and uses Microsoft Entra ID to secure the API. articles.title: Use client assertions in OpenID Connect and ASP.NET Core
articles.description: Use client assertions in OpenID Connect and ASP.NET CoreIdentity / Authentication•Software Engineering  / 10mo Client assertions is a method of client authentication which can be used in OpenID Connect.
